name: browsefleetmcp-extension
description: Clean TypeScript rebuild of the BrowseFleetMCP Chrome extension

scripts.build: node scripts/write-build-info.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-content-script.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/background-service.test.mjs tests/cdp.test.mjs tests/content-hit-testing.test.mjs tests/control-transport.test.mjs tests/focus-lock.test.mjs tests/offscreen.test.mjs tests/popup.test.mjs tests/runtime.test.mjs tests/session-controller.test.mjs tests/session-hub.test.mjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node --test tests/e2e-single-session.test.mjs tests/e2e-background-actions.test.mjs tests/e2e-focus-required-actions.test.mjs tests/e2e-focus-lock.test.mjs
scripts.test:full: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
